_rationale: Task #9 (PM condition): curated 13F universe, not a full EDGAR crawl. Filers = ~12 of the largest US institutional managers by 13F AUM — their aggregate position changes are the 'smart money' signal input the chip module needs (FR-14), while keeping EDGAR egress tiny and polite (R-01). cusip_map covers only tickers we can map with confidence; an unmapped US ticker honestly yields NO 13F rows (task #10 reads that as chip-unavailable — never fabricated). CIKs are zero-padded 10-digit strings per EDGAR convention; this file is config data, editable without a deploy. 13F data is quarterly positioning with a ~45-day filing delay (R-04 / FR-16) — never presented as live.
